rawFact: Missing milk? Batteries? Detergent? pandamart delivers over 20,000 products in under 25 minutes through your foodpanda app. It's everyday online shopping made easy. Choose your favourite shops for everything from groceries to drinks to health to pharmaceuticals and even electronics. Head to checkout and our pandamart rider will be at your door in a flash.

sourceTitle: Grab to Acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda Delivery Business in Taiwan | Grab SG
rawFact: SINGAPORE and TAIPEI – March 23, 2026 – Grab Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: GRAB) (“Grab”), a leading super app in Southeast Asia, and Delivery Hero SE (FSE: DHER) (“Delivery Hero”) have reached an agreement for Grab to acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda delivery business in Taiwan in cash for $600 million, on a cash-free and debt-free basis, subject to customary closing adjustments. Closing of the acquisition (“Closing”) is subject to regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions, and is expected to take place in the second half of 2026.
summary: SINGAPORE and TAIPEI – March 23, 2026 – Grab Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: GRAB) (“Grab”), a leading super app in Southeast Asia, and Delivery Hero SE (FSE: DHER) (“Delivery Hero”) have reached an agreement for Grab to acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda delivery bu

sourceTitle: Grab to Acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda Delivery Business in Taiwan | Grab SG
rawFact: Niklas Östberg, CEO and Co-Founder of Delivery Hero, said, “The foodpanda team in Taiwan has built a fantastic business and we thank them for their hard work. A transaction like this is a significant undertaking, but we are delighted to have agreed this cash deal, which reflects strength and attractiveness of the business in Taiwan. This divestment is a key first step in our ongoing strategic review.”
summary: Niklas Östberg, CEO and Co-Founder of Delivery Hero, said, “The foodpanda team in Taiwan has built a fantastic business and we thank them for their hard work. A transaction like this is a significant undertaking, but we are delighted to have agreed this cash d

sourceTitle: Grab to Acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda Delivery Business in Taiwan | Grab SG
rawFact: Grab and foodpanda are committed to maintaining a high level of service for all stakeholders throughout this process. Until the deal closes, Delivery Hero is fully committed to continue operating foodpanda Taiwan as usual. The parties have entered into a Support Services Agreement under which Delivery Hero will provide transition support services to foodpanda Taiwan in the period following Closing, to ensure that the local community remains well-supported as they move to the Grab platform.

sourceTitle: Grab to Acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda Delivery Business in Taiwan | Grab SG
rawFact: Grab is targeting completion of the full platform migration of users, merchant-partners and driver-partners from foodpanda to the Grab app by early 2027.
summary: Grab is targeting completion of the full platform migration of users, merchant-partners and driver-partners from foodpanda to the Grab app by early 2027.
